summary: School Intelligence Panel refactored to decision-first layout - ALL 16 features verified. Recommended Strategy section now at TOP with dynamic CTAs. Engagement Status merged from Opportunity/Timing + Coach Signals. Fit Summary with inline strengths/gaps. Collapsible score breakdown (default closed). 'Needs more data' replaces 'Low confidence'. Old standalone sections (Strengths, Risks, Opportunity, Coach Signals) removed.
critical_code_review_comments: SchoolIntelligencePanel.js: Clean decision-first layout with strategy at top as requested
deriveEngagementState(): Correctly merges opportunity/timing + coach signals into 3 states (active/stale/none)
deriveStrategy(): Returns correct labels (Continue Pursuing/High Priority/Reconsider)
dataQualityLabel(): Returns 'Needs more data' with reason instead of 'Low confidence'
Dynamic CTAs: 'Send First Email'/'Generate Follow-up' for no signals, 'Follow Up'/'Email Coach' with signals
Inline strengths (green checks) and gaps (amber warnings) render correctly in Fit Summary
Score breakdown collapsed by default with toggle working
seed_data_creation: Used existing UCLA (85095202-8b95-4cb2-9390-3275d7840a3d, score 75) and Stanford (e02f08c6-7c47-430a-aa8d-787a6fbeae00, score 68) programs
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Intelligence Panel refactored. NEW data-testid selectors: si-recommended-strategy (FIRST section), si-strategy-label, si-strategy-explanation, si-strategy-action, si-primary-cta, si-secondary-cta, si-engagement-status, si-engagement-label, si-engagement-description, si-fit-summary, si-match-score, si-fit-label, si-data-quality, si-breakdown-toggle, si-breakdown-{key}, si-view-details-btn. OLD REMOVED selectors: si-header, si-strengths, si-risks, si-opportunity-timing, si-coach-signals, si-confidence. Drawer wrapper unchanged (si-drawer, si-drawer-close, si-drawer-backdrop, si-compact-preview).
